title: Add animations to subsidy structure, add office address, and add service area

requirements.text: Add scroll-triggered entrance animations to the subsidy structure section in OdishaGuide.tsx. The subsidy tier table rows and related elements should animate in with fade-in and slide-up effects using IntersectionObserver (consistent with the BankFinanceBanner animation pattern). Include prefers-reduced-motion support.

quotes: Modify the subsidy structure part with animation

acceptanceCriteria: Subsidy structure table rows animate in with fade-in and slide-up on scroll into view
Animation uses IntersectionObserver and CSS keyframes consistent with BankFinanceBanner approach
Animation does not affect layout or readability of the subsidy data

requirements.text: Add TRI-GITA SERVICES office address to the Footer component. The address is: Shri Hari Niwas, Dengimacha, Near Dengimacha Ministadium, Sambalpur, Odisha 768006. Display it alongside the existing contact details.

quotes: Add TRI-GITA SERVICES office address- Shri Hari Niwas, Dengimacha ,Near Dengimacha Ministadium, Sambalpur,Odisha 768006

acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays the full office address: Shri Hari Niwas, Dengimacha, Near Dengimacha Ministadium, Sambalpur, Odisha 768006
Address is styled consistently with the existing footer contact details
Address is visible on both mobile and desktop layouts

requirements.text: Add a 'Service Area: Odisha' entry to the Footer component and/or a relevant section (such as WhyChooseUs or a dedicated info block). Display it clearly so users know the geographic coverage of TRI-GITA SERVICES.
acceptanceCriteria: Service area 'Odisha' is displayed in a prominent, readable location (Footer or relevant section)
Label reads 'Service Area: Odisha' or equivalent clear phrasing
Styling is consistent with surrounding elements

constraints: Do not alter the immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components)
Animation style must be consistent with the existing BankFinanceBanner animation approach
nonGoals: Changing the overall page layout or color scheme
Animating sections other than the subsidy structure
